subcodes.first_line: O spiritual child and luminous youth! Take in hand the lute of praise, turning thy heart toward God, and strike it with the plectrum of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الولد الروحانی و الغلام النورانی خذ عود التسبیح بید التوجه الی الله و اضرب بمضراب المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @mystical themes
